calendar.view_only_please_select_desire_time: There is no meeting time yet
calendar.please_mark_your_calendar: Please select your available times by dragging on the calendar.
calendar.description:
Please set at least 3 schedules for meetings with experts.
The meeting will be confirmed at the time selected by the expert from the set schedules.
(Example: 3-6 PM on the 25th, 10-12 AM on the 28th, 2-4 PM on the 29th)
calendar.link_not_register: The meeting link has not been registered yet.
calendar.error_drag_outside: Please select an itinerary within the suggested time range. If you would like a different time, please suggest a more suitable schedule or contact the manager.
calendar.please_select_meeting_time: Please select a meeting time with your client.
calendar.please_select_from_1_to_2: Please select from a minimum of 1 hour to a maximum of 2 hours
calendar.please_select_from_1_to_2_client: Please select as many available times as possible (e.g., Mon 10:00-20:00, Tue 14:00-16:00, etc.)
calendar.please_select_from_1_to_2_green:
Please select from a minimum of 1 hour to a maximum of 2 hours.
Please select an available time by dragging the mouse.
calendar.please_select_meeting_time_with_expert: Please select a meeting time with your expert.
